operational_knowledge_units.title: Map Monitor Quick Select provides map visibility toggles and selection shortcuts
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The Map Monitor Quick Select area includes options to view all AGV active paths, station IDs, and charger IDs, and includes selection functions for robots, containers, cells, and chargers.
observed_evidence: Visible text: 'View all AGV active paths'

relationships.target: Selection functions for robots, containers, cells, and chargers

operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Map Monitor Quick Select UI reference. Quick Select supports viewing all AGV active paths, viewing station IDs, viewing charger IDs, and selecting robots, containers, cells, and chargers from the Map Monitor.

procedure_candidate_attempts.title: Use Map Monitor Quick Select options
preconditions: User is viewing the Map Monitor screen.
Quick Select controls are available in the UI.
procedure_candidate_attempts.procedure_visual_summary: Slide lists Quick Select capabilities in Map Monitor for viewing AGV paths, station IDs, charger IDs, and selecting robots, containers, cells, and chargers.

steps.instruction: Open or view the Map Monitor Quick Select area.
steps.validation_check: Confirm the Map Monitor Quick Select options are displayed.

steps.instruction: Use the available Quick Select options as needed to view AGV active paths, station IDs, charger IDs, or to select a robot, container, cell, or charger.
steps.expected_outcome: The selected map visibility or selection function is applied.
steps.validation_check: Confirm the requested visibility item or object selection is shown in Map Monitor.

warnings: The slide lists available Quick Select functions but does not show exact button names, control locations, or detailed interaction sequence.
procedure_candidate_attempts.retrieval_text: Navigation candidate for Map Monitor Quick Select. From Map Monitor, use Quick Select to view AGV active paths, station IDs, charger IDs, or select robots, containers, cells, and chargers. Exact UI interaction details are not shown on the slide.
